demos.text: While this technique is not unique to PyTorch, it's one of the fastest implementations of it to date. You get the best of speed and flexibility for your crazy research.
demos.reasoning: The passage uses concise, promotional language with a natural conversational tone and a specific reference to PyTorch. Its wording resembles human-written technical marketing copy rather than strongly templated or overly generic AI-generated text. Therefore, it is classified as not AI-generated.

demos.text: PyTorch has minimal framework overhead. We integrate acceleration libraries such as Intel MKL and NVIDIA (cuDNN, NCCL) to maximize speed. At the core, its CPU and GPU Tensor and neural network backends are mature and have been tested for years.

signature.instructions: Decide whether the supplied passage was generated by an AI.

fields.description: True for AI-generated text; otherwise False
